title: poa nephelochloides
intro: Poa nephelochloides, also known as misty meadow grass or foggy meadow grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa nephelochloides include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Maori medicine to treat various health conditions.
